title: Turn off notifications for deleted/archived items
excerpt: Add a setting to turn off notifications for deletions/archiving items you’re subscribed to. Just because I’m assigned as a resource on an item (not assigned to me, just added as a resources) doesnt mean i want every noti…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Add a setting to turn off notifications for deletions/archiving items you’re subscribed to. Just because I’m assigned as a resource on an item (not assigned to me, just added as a resources) doesnt mean i want every notification that something got deleted or archived.
